title: podman-play-kube link in readme is broken
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

The README in the ["out of scope" section](https://github.com/containers/libpod#out-of-scope) has a reference to

> (see podman-play-kube)

wherein the link points to `https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/docs/podman-play-kube.1.md`, but no such document exists.

comments.body:
Link should be changed to:
https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/docs/source/markdown/podman-play-kube.1.md
Interested in opening a PR to change this?
